sys_script_client.description: 2.8.1 | 2023-01-18 | raj | STRY0130626 - Out of Office Modal- Submit New Schedule 2.8.1 | 2023-01-18 | raj | DFCT0011475 - In the OOO Edit or New Modal, the duration fields should Not allow for entries where the "Start date" is after the "End date"
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - The Start Date must be before the End Date
sys_script_client.name: Out of Office - onChnage - Start Date
sys_script_client.sys_name: Out of Office - onChnage - Start Date
